name: You're in Danger!
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>未</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>み</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>域</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>歓</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>待</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Warm Welcome of the Lands Unknown
desc: Reveal 3 "Danger!" monsters with different names from your Deck, your opponent randomly picks 1 for you to Special Summon, and you shuffle the rest into the Deck. During the End Phase, destroy that Special Summoned monster. You can only activate 1 "You're in Danger!" per turn.
eff: Reveal 3 "Danger!" monsters with different names from your Deck, your opponent randomly picks 1 for you to Special Summon, and you shuffle the rest into the Deck. During the End Phase, destroy that Special Summoned monster. You can only activate 1 "You're in Danger!" per turn.
